summary: Wrap the value of `query=` in literal double quotes before sending /tickets/filter and /changes/filter requests, and route both filter commands through the wrapFreshserviceFilterQuery helper.
reason: Freshservice's filter endpoint requires the entire query value to arrive as a double-quoted string before URL encoding; the generator emitted the raw user string and the API responded HTTP 500. Same quirk applies to /assets?filter=, so the resolver in assets_get.go calls the same helper.
validated_outcome: tickets filter --query "status:2 AND priority:4" now returns the expected page; previously returned `{"description":"Validation failed","errors":[{"field":"query","message":"There was an unexpected error"}]}` with HTTP 500.
